name: Mayhem [From Star Glitcher/SG.]
description:
Originates from a game called Star-Glitcher, a Battlegrounds-like Roblox game where you can kill other users for soul orbs, and you can use them to get new - Mayhem is the mode you spawn with.
[you don't have to grind for different modes/characters by the way, just press any key on your keyboard.]
Z, X, C, & V are your ability keybinds; B, N, & M are used for sub-modes.

Mayhem isn't its name, btw. Mayhem is a Subspecies of Spectrum [Spawn] Star-Glitcher.

Also, just imagine Sixer [G36] from Forsaken as the appearance, except with black horns, no fire, and no glowing face.
creator: Redgite
